objective: Replace brittle deterministic parser with hybrid approach: Cheerio for clean HTML, local Ollama LLM for complex ads.
completed_this_session: Fixed bug in request-handler.ts: when HTML products are junk AND LLM produced nothing, the code now falls back to Cheerio parser instead of returning junk
Verified: 기프티콩 (6 products via Cheerio), 다시봄을 (2 via Cheerio), 행복shms (2 via Cheerio) all pass
Verified: 구독플레이스 and DENMARK produce products via HTML path (partial pass — full verification needs Ollama LLM)
All 96 unit/integration tests pass (npm run test:competitor-intel)
Confirmed DB migrations for account_type and products_full_json columns already applied

key_change.what: Added `useHtml = htmlProducts.length > 0 && !htmlProductsLookBad` guard so junk HTML products fall back to Cheerio parser when LLM is absent
key_change.why: Without this, vendors like 기프티콩 would get 9 'OTT 구독' junk products from HTML path instead of 6 clean Cheerio products

still_needs_ollama: 구독플레이스: Cheerio=0, HTML=1 junk sentence fragment. LLM expected to extract 2+ products (Netflix, etc.)
DENMARK: Cheerio=0, HTML=2 products with generic names ('프리미엄 1달', '3달'). LLM expected to produce cleaner names like 'YouTube Premium' with proper durations
Install Ollama and run `scripts/test-all-vendors.ts` with Ollama available for full verification
